channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: March Madness will pay women's teams under a new structure approved by the NCAA
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Women's basketball teams finally will be paid for playing games in the NCAA Tournament each March just like the men have for years under a plan approved Wednesday at the NCAA convention.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jayden Daniels accomplishes a feat last done by Slinging Sammy Baugh in 1937
item.description: Jayden Daniels, meet Slinging Sammy Baugh. The Commanders' dynamic rookie quarterback accomplished a feat in his playoff debut that no quarterback in the NFL had done since Baugh during the franchise's first season in Washington back in 1937.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bruins open 4-goal lead, add 2 short-handed empty-netters to beat Lightning 6-2
item.description: David Pastrnak had a goal and two assists and Parker Wotherspoon scored his first NHL goal on Tuesday night to help the Boston Bruins open a four-goal lead and hold on to beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-2.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sammy Sosa to attend 2025 Cubs Convention, team announces
item.description: Former Chicago Cub and fan favorite Sammy Sosa will attend the 2025 Cubs Convention, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: House Republicans pass bill to ban transgender athletes from girls’ sports
item.description: House Republicans passed a bill Tuesday to bar transgender student-athletes from competing in girls’ sports, putting the contentious issue front and center following an election cycle that saw it become a frequent target of Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Bronco's season comes to an end following 31-7 loss to Buffalo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Denver Broncos’ long-awaited playoff return ended Sunday in Upstate New York. After eight years away from the postseason, the Broncos found themselves in the spotlight, led by rookie quarterback Bo Nix.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Ezra Ausar scores 21 as Utah earns first Big 12 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar scored a season-high 21 points in just 17 minutes of action. as the Utah basketball team won its first Big 12 Conference game Saturday, beating Oklahoma State, 83-62.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Red Rocks finish fourth in high-powered quad meet
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The #4 Utah gymnastics team got a sense of where it stacks up early in the season against some of the top teams in the country.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles Rams' playoff game moved to Arizona as wildfires disrupt sports in Southern California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NFL moved the Los Angeles Rams’ playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings out of Southern California on Thursday, the biggest of several changes to the sports calendar after days of devastating wildfires in the area.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How you can snag $10 tickets to a Utah Hockey Club game
item.description: If you've been eager to be a part of Utah Hockey Club's inaugural season but felt a little overwhelmed by the price of tickets, you may have a chance to snag tickets for just $10 apiece.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Independent streak helped build Notre Dame into football's historic and now modern behemoth
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — It was some combination of religion, a grudge involving Knute Rockne and maybe the simple notion that some people just don't like Notre Dame.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
